note: The end-of-scene bookkeeping loop as executable rows. tick.py reads this + campaign/state.json + genre.json and ADVANCES world state (rolling stochastic advances through the engine, scaled by Chaos), emitting a JSON changelog + surfacing directives. bridge/subsystems.md keeps only the Operative pointer for the engine's tick.py.

subsystems.note: advance each open villain/faction/threat front's clock (1 + a Chaos-scaled roll); surface a telegraph when it crosses a stage, a Turning Point when it fills
list open campaign clocks (clocks.json); the GM advances the ones the fiction implies via fu.py clock tick
tick in-progress PC Projects and Rituals toward completion during downtime/rest
0 FP at session start -> +1; villain entrance -> +1 each PC; Surrender -> +2; show villain Ultima pools
rebuild the 30-40 card seed deck from PC Bonds/Themes, open fronts, live NPCs, and genre conflict themes
raise Chaos when a front fills or the heroes are overwhelmed; lower when they resolve a threat; respect the genre floor
